subject: Re: 432-Yuck Junk Removal — quick question
preview: HI. my number is 7809658326. I am free after 6pm today or tomorrow is fine too

thread.text:
Hi there,

Most local service businesses in Edmonton are losing jobs every week the same way — leads come in, follow-up is too slow, and the customer books someone else.

We build automation systems that respond to new leads in under 60 seconds, handle the qualifying questions, and lock in the booking — without anyone on your team doing the work.

Clients typically recover 3–5 lost jobs per week within the first 30 days.

Open to a 15-minute call this week to see if it's a fit for 432-Yuck Junk Removal?

Jack Wilde
CEO, Wildrose Automations
wildroseautomations.com
Yea sure. You can call me right now I have some time available

Hey, appreciate the quick reply!

What's the best number to reach you at? And would sometime after 6 PM work — either today or anytime tomorrow?

Jack Wilde
CEO, Wildrose Automations
wildroseautomations.com
HI. my number is 7809658326. I am free after 6pm today or tomorrow is fine too

Hey, perfect — we'll give you a call tomorrow.

We'll shoot you a quick text first just to confirm the time works. Looking forward to connecting.

Jack Wilde
CEO, Wildrose Automations
wildroseautomations.com
